description: Wanderlust GOAT — what a knowledgeable local with great taste would tell you to walk to from here, fused across editorial, local-language, and crowd layers no single tool ranks together.

novel_features.name: Persona-shaped local fanout
novel_features.description: Find the 3-5 amazing things within walking distance that match your stated identity and criteria — not the 40 closest things.

novel_features.name: Heuristic GOAT compound (no LLM)
novel_features.description: Same fanout as `near` but with no LLM in the runtime path — criteria-to-source mapping uses static lookup tables so the CLI works standalone.

novel_features.name: Agent research-plan emitter
novel_features.description: Output a JSON query plan agents execute in a loop — typed, country-aware, ordered by trust, ready to fan out.

novel_features.name: Crossover walks
novel_features.description: Find pairs where a high-trust restaurant sits within 200m of a Wikipedia-notable historic site or Atlas Obscura entry — food + culture in one walk.

novel_features.name: Golden-hour viewpoint hunt
novel_features.description: Compute sunrise/sunset/blue-hour locally (pure Go, no API) and pair with viewpoints photographers know about within walking distance.

novel_features.name: Route-view exploration
novel_features.description: Walking polyline from A to B, then everything interesting along the path — not just at the endpoints.

novel_features.name: City pre-trip sync
novel_features.description: Pre-cache editorial best-of, Reddit threads, Wikipedia, Wikivoyage, OSM POIs, Atlas Obscura, and regional-language sources for offline use.

novel_features.name: Trust-weighted score explanation
novel_features.description: Print every source that mentioned a place, the trust weight, country boost, walking time, criteria match, and the final goat-score breakdown.

novel_features.name: Reddit-quote extractor
novel_features.description: Surface the highest-scored Reddit comment snippets that mention a place — verbatim quotes, no LLM summarization.

novel_features.name: Sync coverage report
novel_features.description: Per-tier row counts, last-sync ages, country-match boost, and which v1 sources are missing for a synced city.

novel_features.name: Quiet-hour discovery
novel_features.description: Places that locals describe as quiet at the requested time, intersected with OSM opening hours and walking radius.
